news.t: IndexIQ Adds to Fast-Growing ESG ETF Suite with Two New Funds

overview.description: The NYLI MacKay High Income ETF (IQHI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg VLI High Yield index. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides broad exposure to high-yield corporate bonds of various maturities from around the world. The fund seeks to maximize current income. IQHI was launched on Oct 25, 2022 and is issued by New York Life Investments.

data.title: IndexIQ Adds to Fast-Growing ESG ETF Suite with Two New Funds
data.text: IndexIQ, a leading provider of innovative multi-asset investment solutions, today announced the launch of two new additions to the firm's fast-growing lineup of ESG investment solutions: the IQ MacKay...
